creative_brief.style: Luxury Wedding Film — elegant, refined, unhurried.
creative_brief.emotionalArc: quiet awe that swells to a graceful, glowing finale
creative_brief.structure: Opening → Love Story → Ceremony → Family & Friends → Ending.
creative_brief.photoSelection: Lead with hero-worthy frames; group candids into montages; keep tender portraits full and unhurried.

notes: Hold hero frames a beat longer to honour the elegant, refined, unhurried tone.
Reserve bounce easing for at most one playful peak.
